name: Skyroot Aerospace

overview.value: Skyroot Aerospace Private Limited is an Indian private aerospace manufacturer and commercial launch service provider headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana. It was founded on 12 June 2018 by former ISRO scientists Pawan Kumar Chandana and Naga Bharath Daka. The company develops the Vikram family of orbital launch vehicles to serve the global small-satellite launch market.

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
